name: Butter Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Mix together flour, baking soda, and salt and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend brown and white sugars with margarine using an electric mixer until well combined.
4. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until fluffy.
5. Add the beaten egg whites, honey, vanilla extract, and almond extract to the sugar mixture. Mix until smooth.
6. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture, butterscotch chips, and chocolate chips to the sugar mixture. Mix on low speed just until combined, being careful not to overmix.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until lightly browned. Transfer cookies to a cool flat surface to set.
